name: ARGAN INC
summary: Argan, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated holding company operating primarily as an engineering and construction firm through three subsidiaries. Its Power segment provides full EPC services for power generation projects including natural gas, solar, wind, biomass, and biofuel facilities in the U.S., Ireland, and U.K. Its Industrial segment provides on-site construction and maintenance services in the U.S. Southeast. Its Teledata segment delivers power distribution and communications network services in the Mid-Atlantic U.S.
